{{Quote|You rely on your mechanized vengeance if you want, Stellskard. But I'm not going to be satisfied until I see the General's remains for myself. Only then will I know his stain has been removed from the galaxy.|Flynn Kybo, to [[Stellskard]], on General Grievous|<ref name="GG3">[[General Grievous 3|''General Grievous'' 3]]</ref>}}
'''Flynn Kybo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] and [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Commander]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
Kybo's [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]], [[T'chooka D'oon]], was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] on a [[Rescue mission to Vandos|mission]] to [[Vandos]] to rescue [[Ambassador/Legends|Ambassador]] [[Quiyyen]]. As a result, he gathered a band of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to seek out Grievous and kill him, something the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] did not approve of.

They eventually found him on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Belsus/Legends|Belsus]] in the [[Anoat system/Legends|Anoat system]], where he was keeping several young [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] hostage. As [[Codi Ty]] evacuated the Padawans, Kybo and [[B'dard Tone]] battled Grievous with blazing [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]]. Master Tone was killed, and Kybo, in a desperate move, cut open a nearby gas pipe, spilling it into the [[Magma/Legends|magma]] below, hoping to kill Grievous as well as himself. He succeeded in the latter, but Grievous survived.
